title: Supply of Goods and Provision of Services 2025
description: Amana Bank Tanzania invitation for supply of goods and provision of services for the year 2025. Full details contained in the attached tender document (PDF).
notes: PDF is image-based (created in Adobe Illustrator) - text extraction requires OCR. Document title metadata: 'Tender2024'. Published date derived from PDF creation date (2024-10-28/29). No closing date was listed on the tender page.
